homepage.text_excerpt: Samantha Dixon Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate Home About My plan News Latest Updates Newsletters In Parliament Latest Activity Visit Parliament Cost of Living Contact Office Standards River Dee Bathing Water Status More Menu Samantha Dixon Prev Next Labour's Manifesto for change It is a huge honour and privilege to have been elected to serve as the Labour Member of Parliament for the new constituency of Chester North and Neston. As your MP, I’m elected to be your voice in Parliament and your champion in Chester North and Neston. Since my election in December 2022, I have supported thousands of people. Every week I receive hundreds of emails with questions and requests for support. If you need my help, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. headings: h3: Further details
pages.text_excerpt: About - Samantha Dixon Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate Home About My plan News Latest Updates Newsletters In Parliament Latest Activity Visit Parliament Cost of Living Contact Office Standards River Dee Bathing Water Status More Menu About Samantha Dixon MP About Sam Samantha Dixon is Labour’s Member of Parliament for Chester North and Neston. She served as the Member of Parliament for the City of Chester from December 2022 until the dissolution of Parliament in May 2024. On the 4th July 2024, Sam was re-elected as a Member of Parliament for the new constituency of Chester North and Neston. Sam has campaigned on ending sewage dumping in the River Dee, supporting residents and businesses through the cost of living crisis, and reforming the leasehold system to give homeowners a better deal. Between 2011 an 2023, Sam was a local councillor for the City and Garden Quarter ward in Cheshire West and Chester council, before becoming leader of the council in 2015. She led the council during the Storyhouse and the Northgate development, established the country’s first council-led Poverty Truth commission, and was awarded an MBE for her services to the city. She studied English Literature at Sheffield University and was involved in the university newspaper. Sam has lived in Chester since she was a child, and continues to live in the city with her husband and three children. Sam's plan for Chester North and Neston Further details Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of the Labour Party, 20 Rushworth Street, London SE10SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. Constituents are able to request a free Inside UK Parliament guided tour, and my office will do their best to accommodate based on availability. Visit Parliament First name Last name Email address Telephone number What would you like to do on your visit? I can help try and arrange an official tour and I can try to book you tickets to view the activity in the House of Commons from the viewing gallery. Let me know how we can help: Tour Gallery tickets What's your address in Chester North and Neston? h3: Further details
pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Samantha Dixon Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate Home About My plan News Latest Updates Newsletters In Parliament Latest Activity Visit Parliament Cost of Living Contact Office Standards River Dee Bathing Water Status More Menu Contact Need my help? Members of Parliament must follow strict protocols which only allow them to act on behalf of residents within their own constituency. You can find out if I am your MP by clicking the button below. Find your MP So that I can help you, I will need: Your full name Your full postal address including post code A contact telephone number and an email address if you have one Your national insurance number (where relevant) Copies of any supporting documents (where relevant) using the file attachment If you do not included relevant information, this will increase the time it takes for my office team to process your enquiry. Support form Need an appointment? If you would prefer to discuss your matter with me in person, over the phone, or via video link, then you can request an appointment slot by filling in my online form: Appointment booking form Further Contact Details To write to me, please use my address in the Houses of Parliament: Samantha Dixon MP, Houses of Parliament, London SW1A 0AA. My constituency office, located at The Bluecoat Building on Upper Northgate Street can be reached on 01244 343 229. My email address is samantha.dixon.mp@parliament.uk. Please find some further links below, which I hope are helpful for other support: Help with council issues Issues relating to services provided by Cheshire West and Chester Council can be raised with the relevant council department or your local councillor. You can find your local councillor and write to them by entering your postcode here . You can find out more about council services here. You can also report local issues directly to the Council through their online Report It Tool Further sources of advice If you urgently need support due to financial crisis or poverty, you can try contacting the HELP! Scheme . The Live Well website also has lots of information on local groups and support services that can help people with isolation, food and fuel poverty, health issues and other issues in Chester. You can find specific cost of living support and advice here . Follow on social media Further details Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of the Labour Party, 20 Rushworth Street, London SE10SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
